HEAVEN11_SAVE_QUIT_CONFIRM_BODY:
There is no retreat in the Spire.
Save and Quit will destroy this run.
HEAVEN_DESC_1: The tower gradually strips away your power to choose. Fate begins to narrow.
HEAVEN_DESC_2: Every opportunity comes with a price.
HEAVEN_DESC_3: Wounds cannot fully heal. Rely on limited supplies to move forward.
HEAVEN_DESC_4: The tower's flames do not consume you at once. They scorch you slowly.
HEAVEN_DESC_5: You lose your rhythm at the start of battle. Strategy is disturbed immediately.
HEAVEN_DESC_6: The adventure begins from a more dangerous state.
HEAVEN_DESC_7: Every kill demands your own blood as tribute to the tower.
HEAVEN_DESC_8: Healing and supplies are exceedingly scarce. You must rely on limited resources.
HEAVEN_DESC_9: Repeatedly cycling the deck dulls the mind and slows action.
HEAVEN_DESC_10: The tower tests you tirelessly. In the final battle, the tower devours your cards.
HEAVEN_DESC_11: Once you step into the Spire, there is no turning back.
